data.title: 'Cost to supply potatoes has risen 40%'
data.description: A Staffordshire farmer says the industry will struggle to absorb rising costs.
data.content: Paul Brown, who farms potatoes near Eccleshall, Staffordshire, has said the cost to buy new supply has risen by up to 40%, casting doubt on upcoming yields.
